name: code

edits.disables: All VS Code telemetry tiers (crash, error, usage). Supersedes deprecated telemetry.enableTelemetry / telemetry.enableCrashReporter — never write both.

persistent_files.note: Per-extension state; may include telemetry queues for third-party extensions.

cli_flags.note: Diagnostic / per-invocation flag (e.g. `code tunnel --disable-telemetry`); not a persistent opt-out.

process_check.if_running: Quit VS Code before editing settings.json — graceful-shutdown rewrite can clobber manual edits.

notes: telemetry.telemetryLevel is the one canonical key — never double-write the deprecated enableTelemetry / enableCrashReporter alongside it.

caveats.framing: If github.copilot / github.copilot-chat extensions are installed (check ~/.vscode/extensions/), they DO NOT inherit telemetry.telemetryLevel per Microsoft docs. Check each extension's own telemetry docs separately. Skill never auto-writes Copilot-specific keys.
